expected_tangles.about: Bex's migration 0042 ADDS an orders.status enum column; Cyrus's migration 0041 RENAMES orders.state to status as an enum — two migrations defining the same orders.status column in the same window, an incompatible schema collision plus an ordering conflict (0041 vs 0042)
Dana reads the orders table read-only for a report and mentions 'status'; she runs no migration and writes nothing, so there is no resource to collide on — surface overlap only
